<features>
- presence of antlers: yes
- body shape: elongated, four legs
- background color: predominantly blue
- animal color: dark brown/grey with some lighter areas
</features>
<kb>
- IF [presence of antlers = yes AND body shape = elongated, four legs] THEN [4]
- IF [presence of a beak = yes OR long neck = yes OR small body with wings = yes] THEN [2]
- IF [body shape = broad, short legs AND skin texture = bumpy/smooth] THEN [6]
- IF [body shape = robust, four legs, no antlers] THEN [7]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The rule for class 4 fires because the Query Image clearly shows an animal with antlers and an elongated body with four legs.
</rule_check>
<response>4</response>

<response>2</response>
